learning_outcomes.description: Recognise and explain the importance of business analytics to managerial decision making
Explain the basic concepts used in business analytics and their applications to managerial decision making
Identify and apply the appropriate methods of business analytics for solving a range of business problems
Compare and critically evaluate the various approaches to business analytics, and
Evaluate the value of business analytics for improving managerial and strategic decision making.

assessments.due_date:
Week 4

Assessment 1 (Component 1) will be done in your Week 4 Tutorial (Tutorial 3).
assessments.task_description:
Assessment 1 consists of two components: Component 1 - Structured Summary (10%) and Component 2 - Article Review (20%).

Assessment 1 (Component 1): Structured Summary requires students to write a structured summary of a business analytics related article in a tutorial class (Tutorial 3 - Teaching Week 4).

Further details regarding assessment requirements, format, and style are provided in the Assessment 1 Guide, available on Blackboard, and will also be discussed in class.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
This assessment component involves constructing a critical article review on a selected business analytics topic.

Further details regarding assessment requirements, format, and style are provided in the Assessment 1 Guide, available on Blackboard, and will also be discussed in class.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
Assessment 2 comprises two components: Component 1 - Case Study Report (40%) and Component 2 - Poster Presentation (20%).

Assessment 2 (Component 1): Case Study Report requires students to prepare a business analytics report on a selected real business.

Further details regarding assessment requirements, format, and style are provided in the Assessment 2 Guide, available on Blackboard, and will also be discussed in class.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.due_date:
Week 13

The poster must be submitted by the end of your Tutorial 12 in Teaching Week 13.
assessments.task_description:
Assessment 2 (Component 2): Poster Presentation involves preparing and presenting a poster based on the content of the Case Study Report. The poster will be presented in Tutorial 12 (Teaching Week 13).

Further details regarding assessment requirements, format, and style are provided in the Assessment 2 Guide, available on Blackboard, and will also be discussed in class.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
A reflective assessment in which students record a brief video presenting their key learnings from the course and how these differ from their previous perspectives and experiences. 

More details regarding the reflective assessment will be discussed later in the semester and provided on Blackboard as the Assessment 3 Guide.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.

learning_activities.topic:
Course Introduction and the Business Analytics Field

This lecture introduces the BSAN2201 course and assessments, the Business Analytics major/field, and career pathways.

Note: There are no tutorials in Week 1. Tutorials will commence from Week 2.

Learning outcomes: L01
